passage.title: A Day with Revision of Days 21-30
passage.text: I used to go to school daily. I could swim when I was a child. I should have come earlier. He must have worked very hard. I could have done this earlier. If I had known, I would have come. He may have gone there. He might have gone, but I am not sure. I will come tomorrow. We ought to respect our parents.
passage.hindiTranslation: मैं रोज़ स्कूल जाता था। मैं बचपन में तैर सकता था। मुझे पहले आना चाहिए था। उसने जरूर बहुत मेहनत की होगी। मैं यह पहले कर सकता था। अगर मुझे पता होता, तो मैं आता। वह शायद वहाँ गया होगा। वह शायद गया होगा, लेकिन पक्का नहीं। मैं कल आऊँगा। हमें अपने माता-पिता की इज्जत करनी चाहिए।

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I used to go..."?
options: He might have gone, but I am not sure.
He used to smoke.
I could swim when I was a child.
I used to go to school daily.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: I used to go to school daily.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I used to go to school daily."
